creator: trevor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I erroneously added a port (security/digest) with the same name 
and similar function.  Also, Kris Kennaway has pointed out that 
openssl, which exists in the 4.x and 5.x base system, has these 
capabilities.  I have been in e-mail contact with the submitter, 
and have asked him whether one of these will be suitable for his 
needs (I also offered him maintainership).
